overall.description: Dashcam footage of a vehicle driving on a rural two-lane highway at night. The car passes various commercial billboards, road signs, and a roadside vendor stall while navigating gentle curves illuminated by headlights.

events.description: passing speed limit sign indicating 60 km/h on right side of road

agents.ego_description: driving straight on dark rural highway, headlights illuminating road ahead and passing road signs

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow billboard with red text visible at start
white road sign with black text and arrows
square white regulatory sign with black 60 indicating speed limit
low bushes and cactus-like plants lining both sides of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight along a dark rural highway illuminated by headlights. A prominent yellow billboard stands on the left while the car passes various road signs including a 60 km/h speed limit sign on the right. Sparse vegetation lines both sides of the asphalt road.

events.description: passing roadside vendor stall with colorful umbrella setup on right shoulder

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along highway, approaching and passing a roadside vendor setup on the right

entered.detail: small vendor setup with colorful striped umbrella and yellow crates on road shoulder
silver metal guardrail beginning on left side of road

segments.scene_description: The highway continues straight as the vehicle approaches a roadside vendor stall with a colorful umbrella on the right shoulder. Metal guardrails begin to appear on the left side of the road. The vendor setup includes what appears to be fruit crates displayed under the umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving highway with guardrails and communication tower

events.description: road curves gently to the right, red and white communication tower becomes visible on right side

agents.ego_description: navigating gentle right curve on highway, passing continuous guardrails and approaching distant lights

entered.detail: tall lattice tower painted with red and white stripes for aviation visibility
silver metal guardrail now visible on right side of curving road
large illuminated billboard with green background and white text

segments.scene_description: The road curves gently to the right with metal guardrails now lining both sides. A prominent red and white communication tower stands on the right horizon, while illuminated billboards continue to appear along the route. The vehicle maintains steady speed through the curve toward distant urban lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a dark rural highway that gradually transitions from a sparse roadside environment into a more developed corridor leading toward distant urban lights. It begins with the vehicle moving straight through the darkness, passing a prominent yellow billboard on the left and a speed limit sign on the right amidst sparse vegetation. As the car continues forward, the scene shifts to include a roadside vendor stall with a colorful umbrella and fruit crates on the right shoulder, while metal guardrails begin to emerge on the left. The road then curves gently to the right, with guardrails now lining both sides of the asphalt. Finally, the camera passes illuminated billboards and a red and white communication tower on the horizon as the vehicle steers toward the glow of a far-off city.
